utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all seven with detailed information: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) is specified; travel_dates (June 11–15, 2024) are specific; transportation includes flight details (airline, class, round-trip info, dates, times) and cost; accommodation specifies hotel name, type, amenities, and cost; activities list several options with locations and costs; additional_services include meals with cost; total_budget provides a full cost breakdown. All required items are present and fully specified.
